name: Blender Chocolate Chip Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place all ingredients in the blender container in the order listed.
3. Cover and blend on high speed, stopping occasionally to scrape sides, for 45 seconds (the batter will be slightly lumpy).
4. Pour batter into paper-lined medium muffin cups, filling each about 2/3 full.
5. Bake until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean, 25 to 30 minutes.
6. Remove from pan immediately and let cool completely.
